title: Panda Crafter
description: A drop-in server-side mod that adds a simpler to use auto-crafter.
body: # Panda Crafter ## Description A drop-in server-side mod that adds a simpler to use auto-crafter. Simply craft by putting a dropper over a Crafter block. This creates an "Easy Crafter" that looks like a dropper. Put the recipe pattern in the dropper, place a storage block behind it with ingredients (like a chest), then power to produce recipe reuslt. Originally inspired by https://modrinth.com/mod/eac ## Media ## Try it out `hardcoreanarchy.gay` (Deathban Anarchy) `sky.hardcoreanarchy.gay` (Skyblock Anarchy) ## Support [Support discord here!]( https://discord.gg/3tP3Tqu983) ## License [EasyAutoCrafting](https://modrinth.com/mod/eac) Is licensed under [MIT](https://mit-license.org/) New files authored by me are licensed under [CC0](https://creativecommons.org/public-domain/cc0/)
